Implements Activation Doctrine, ternary Supported/Unsupported/Indeterminate for decision + integrity_classification, pre-filter for prompt_injection/exfil, KV logging of activations (7d TTL), strict JSON schema enforcement + fallback to Indeterminate, PWDither sketch in doctrine/fewshots, receptor_event_suggestions. Uses llama-3.2-3b-instruct. Partial realization of some canonical concepts (ternary, receptor, guard flags, purpose anchoring).

HOLD explicitly consumes budget and records ignored regions. Direct match to 'ternary action', HOLD fog concepts, stabilization via scars/recovery.
